'''tayaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khaleefeh|khaleefeh]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-y-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khaleefeh|khaleefeh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tayaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæyæyæth|tæyæyæth]] || [[word:tæyæyæj|tæyæyæj]] || [[word:tæyæyæsh|tæyæyæsh]] || [[word:tæyæyæ|tæyæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tayayayath|tayayayath]] || [[word:tayayayaj|tayayayaj]] || [[word:tayayayash|tayayayash]] || [[word:tayayaya|tayayaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tayayath|tayayath]] || [[word:tayayaj|tayayaj]] || [[word:tayayash|tayayash]] || [[word:tayaya|tayaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tayafyath|tayafyath]] || [[word:tayafyaj|tayafyaj]] || [[word:tayafyash|tayafyash]] || [[word:tayafyaf|tayafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tayayatha|tayayatha]] || [[word:tayayaja|tayayaja]] || [[word:tayayasha|tayayasha]] || [[word:tayayaka|tayayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tayayath|tayayath]] || [[word:tayayaj|tayayaj]] || [[word:tayayash|tayayash]] || [[word:tayaya|tayaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tayayathal|tayayathal]] || [[word:tayayajal|tayayajal]] || [[word:tayayashal|tayayashal]] || [[word:tayayakal|tayayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tayayathatha|tayayathatha]] || [[word:tayayajaja|tayayajaja]] || [[word:tayayashasha|tayayashasha]] || [[word:tayayaka|tayayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tayayathan|tayayathan]] || [[word:tayayajan|tayayajan]] || [[word:tayayashan|tayayashan]] || [[word:tayayakan|tayayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tayayathaoro|tayayathaoro]] || [[word:tayayajaoro|tayayajaoro]] || [[word:tayayashaoro|tayayashaoro]] || [[word:tayayakaoro|tayayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
